name: todo-txt
title: Todo.txt
description: Manage tasks in todo.txt format with priorities, projects, contexts, and due dates.
author: jeksn

commands.name: list-todos
commands.title: Search Todos
commands.description: Search, filter, and manage tasks in your todo.txt file

commands.name: add-todo
commands.title: Create Todo
commands.description: Create a new task with priority, project, context, and due date

commands.name: quick-add
commands.title: Quick Create Todo
commands.description: Create a task using raw todo.txt syntax in a single text field

commands.name: list-done
commands.title: Search Completed Todos
commands.description: Search completed tasks in done.txt and restore or delete them

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Todo Count
commands.description: Show pending task count in the menu bar

preferences.name: doneFilePath
preferences.title: done.txt File
preferences.description: Path to your done.txt file (for archiving completed tasks). Leave empty to use same directory as todo.txt.

preferences.name: archiveDone
preferences.title: Archive Completed Tasks
preferences.description: Move completed tasks to done.txt instead of keeping them in todo.txt
preferences.label: Archive to done.txt

preferences.name: defaultSort
preferences.title: Default Sort Order
preferences.description: How to sort tasks in the list view

preferences.name: showCompleted
preferences.title: Show Completed Tasks
preferences.description: Include completed tasks in the list view
preferences.label: Show completed tasks

preferences.name: groupBy
preferences.title: Group By
preferences.description: How to group tasks in the list view

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
